description:
Your university rocketry team inherited the three-stage rocket design located at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/audit_rocket.ork, but all technical documentation was lost. Before the design review board meeting, conduct a complete design audit and save a specification document to /home/ga/Documents/exports/design_audit.txt. Do not modify the rocket design.

The document must include:
1. Number of stages
2. Stage 1 (sustainer) body tube diameter (mm) and length (mm)
3. Nose cone shape and length (mm)
4. Number of fins on the sustainer
5. Motor designation for each stage
6. Recovery devices present and their approximate diameters (mm)
7. Total loaded mass (grams)
8. Simulated maximum altitude (m), maximum velocity (m/s), and ground hit velocity (m/s)
